title: Classification note
body: This platform preserves the source text’s aggregate counts. A few countries are distinguished as robust multi-layered systems rather than standalone laws, but five jurisdictions are still grouped into a top-tier binding or enacted category for summary purposes.

title: Scope note
body: The state-of-play section and executive summary both use the headline figure of 54 AU states reviewed. That figure is preserved here rather than normalized into a different total.

title: Map note
body: The map classifies only the countries named directly in the source text. A companion country-by-country mapping is referenced but not included here, so unnamed jurisdictions remain inside the aggregate totals.

title: Source note
body: All content on this page is drawn from the supplied DIID policy brief and the examples it names directly. No additional country classifications have been added beyond the source text.
